post.summary: It will provide list of PMP deals available for user.
post.description:
This API provides paginated list of PMP deals based on requested filters along with total filtered count.
**Request Body Details:**

| **Field** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| groupId | Integer | groupId to filter pmp deals inside group. |
| active | Boolean | boolean field to filter active and inactive deals. |
| searchKeywords | List<String> | list of search strings used to search deals by dealId, dealName and description. |
| creativeTypes | List<Integer> | list of creative type ids to filter. |
| exchanges | List<Integer> | list of exchange ids to filter. |
| ids | List<Integer> | list of pmp deal ids(primary key) to filter. |
| dealStatuses | List<String> | list of deal status to filter. valid values are inUse, unUsed and inActive. |
| owIds | List<Integer> | list of owIds to filter deals accessible by provided owIds |
| pageNo | int | page number to retrieve deals. default value is 1. |
| noOfEntries | int | number of deals to retrieve. default value is 50. |
| sortBy | String | sort by string supporting multiple sorting. |

This API can be used by advertiser, workspace or super to create pmp deals as well as assignation of deal to customers along with deal creation.
**Request Body Details:**

| **Field** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| dealId | String | Deal id of the given PMP deal|
| dealName | String | Deal name of the given PMP deal.|
| description | String | Description of the PMP deal|
| cpm | double | CPM value of PMP deal|
| dealCurationTypeId | int | Id of the deal curation type |
| creativeTypes | List<Integer> | List of creative type ids |
| exchangeId | int | Id of exchange associated with PMP deal [Exchanges List](?path=/Master%20API/getExchanges)|
| assignToCustomers | List<Integer> | List of customer ow ids |
| active | boolean | Boolean value representing deal status. |

post.summary: Retrieves a list of PG and PMP deals used for report filter.
post.description:
This api retrieves a list of PG and PMP deals for report filter and also supports filters through request body.
**Request Body Details:**

| **Field** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| deal | Map<String, Set<Integer>> | Map of dealType and list of deal ids(primary key) for filtering |
| dealStatus | List<String> | deal status to filter deals. Valid values are Active and Inactive |
| searchField | String | search string used to search deals by search columns |
| searchBy | List<String> | search columns to perform search on. Valid values are dealId, dealName and exchangeName |
| pageNo | int | page number to view deal. default value is 1. |
| noOfEntries | int | number of deals to retrieve. default value is 50. |
| sortBy | String | sort by string supporting multiple sorting. |
| owIds | Set<Integer> | set of owIds to filter deals accessible by provided owIds |

patch.summary: Update PG Deal details by ID
patch.description:
Updates specific details of a PG Deal identified by its ID. Allows modification of fields like deal ID, deal name, exchange ID, CPM, status ID, description, payment type ID and handles validations & restrictions.

**Request Body Detail**:
| Field         | Type    | Description                                         |
|---------------|---------|-----------------------------------------------------|
| dealId        | String  | Updated Deal ID                                     |
| dealName      | String  | Updated name of the PG Deal                         |
| exchangeId    | Integer | Updated ID of the exchange associated with the deal |
| cpm           | Double  | Updated Cost Per Mille (CPM) rate                   |
| statusId      | Integer | Updated status ID indicating deal's current state   |
| description   | String  | Updated description or notes about the deal         |
| paymentTypeId | Integer | Updated ID indicating the payment type for the deal |

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the PG Deal to be updated

requestBody.description:
Contains details for updating a PG Deal using a PATCH request.
This is a PATCH request, so only the fields being updated need to be included.
The example below shows all possible fields.

value.description: Comprehensive advertising package including display, video, and social media placements for maximum exposure.

Response after successfully updating PG.description: Response after successfully updating PG Deal

dealCreatorOrganizationName.description: Name of the organization that created the deal

dealCreatorOrganizationType.description: Type of the organization that created the deal

inventoriesCount.description: Number of inventories in the deal

CommonResponseIdData.description: Common Response with message and ID

creativeTypes.description: Creative types allowed for the deal. Values are: 11 (image), 13 (HTML), 14 (Video), 15 (Native), 17 (Audio).

items.description: Creative types allowed for the deal. Values are: 11 (image), 13 (HTML), 14 (Video), 15 (Native), 17 (Audio).

exchangeId.description: ID of the exchange for the deal

statusId.description: Status of the deal: 1 = Active, 2 = Inactive

inventoryIds.description: List of inventory IDs to be blocked

items.description: List of inventory IDs to be blocked

CommonResponseString.description: Common response with data as message

DistributionEntry.description: A single label-value pair for distribution data

InventoryDistributionResponse.description: Response for distribution of Inventory by country, Inventory type, creative type, and device type

CreateInventoryGroupRequestDocs.description: Request for creating an Inventory Group

InventoryGroupWithoutStats.description: Inventory Group row without statistics (values may be null/empty)

AddToInventoryGroupRequestDocs.description: Docs-only superset for adding inventories/deals/contextual items to one or more groups

sharedCount.description: Number of entities the group is shared with

count.description: Total count of inventories or deals in the group, depending on group type

id.description: Unique identifier for the static item

name.description: The name of the static item (e.g., status, type)

order.description: The order or position of the item in the list

label.description: A user-friendly label or display name for the static item, typically used for UI representation.

StaticResponseVO.description: Static response value object representing an item in a static list

inActive.description: Total number of Inactive PMP deals

inUse.description: Total number of Active PMP deals

unUsed.description: Total number of Unused PMP deals

activeCampaignIds.description: List of active Campaign IDs deal is assigned to

items.description: List of active Campaign IDs deal is assigned to

otherCampaignIds.description: List of other Campaign IDs deal is assigned to

items.description: List of other Campaign IDs deal is assigned to

deleteAllowed.description: Indicates if the deal can be deleted

InventoryGroupWithStats.description: Inventory Group row with statistics included

InventoryGroupListDataWithoutStatsRecord.description: Inventory Group List Without Stats Response

PMPDealsInInventoryGroupRecords.description: PMP Deals in an Inventory Group

id.description: Unique identifier of the contextual inventory

filteredRecords.description: Number of records returned after filtering

globalBlockedInventoryIds.description: Total number of blocked inventory IDs

BlockedInventoriesResponse.description: Response for global blocked inventories listing

comment.example: This is the comment for this inventory

GlobalBlockedInventory.description: Represents a single globally blocked inventory item

CommonResponseIdArrayData.description: Common Response with message and ID

RemoveContextualInventoryRequestVO.description: Request body for removing contextual inventories from the user's global contextual pool. This does NOT remove contextual inventories from a specific group. To remove contextual inventories from a group, use the removeMappingsOfInventoryGroup endpoint with groupTypeId: 3 and inventoryIds.

contextualInventoryIds.description: IDs of contextual inventories to permanently delete from the user's global contextual inventory pool.

items.description: IDs of contextual inventories to permanently delete from the user's global contextual inventory pool.

groupTypeId.description: Type of inventory group: 1 = Open Exchange, 2 = PMP, 3 = Contextual. For contextual inventory removal from a group, set groupTypeId to 3 and provide inventoryIds.

groupId.description: ID of the inventory group to remove from

inventoryIds.description: Inventory IDs to remove from the group. When groupTypeId is 3 (contextual), these are the contextual inventory IDs to remove from the group.

searchField.description: Search keyword to match inventories for removal

excludedInventoryIds.description: Inventory IDs to exclude from removal

RemoveFromInventoryGroupRequestDocs.description: Docs-only schema for removing inventories/deals/contextual items from an inventory group. For group-scoped contextual inventory removal, use groupTypeId: 3 with inventoryIds containing the contextual inventory IDs to remove from the group.
